/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/ar qc libgpu_sim_lib.a CMakeFiles/gpu_sim_lib.dir/src/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gpu_sim_lib.dir/src/decoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gpu_sim_lib.dir/src/elf_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gpu_sim_lib.dir/src/stats.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gpu_sim_lib.dir/src/functional/alu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gpu_sim_lib.dir/src/functional/functional_model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gpu_sim_lib.dir/src/timing/fetch_stage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gpu_sim_lib.dir/src/timing/decode_stage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gpu_sim_lib.dir/src/timing/warp_scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gpu_sim_lib.dir/src/timing/operand_collector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gpu_sim_lib.dir/src/timing/alu_unit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gpu_sim_lib.dir/src/timing/multiply_unit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gpu_sim_lib.dir/src/timing/divide_unit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gpu_sim_lib.dir/src/timing/tlookup_unit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gpu_sim_lib.dir/src/timing/ldst_unit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gpu_sim_lib.dir/src/timing/writeback_arbiter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gpu_sim_lib.dir/src/timing/mshr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gpu_sim_lib.dir/src/timing/cache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gpu_sim_lib.dir/src/timing/coalescing_unit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gpu_sim_lib.dir/src/timing/memory_interface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gpu_sim_lib.dir/src/timing/panic_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gpu_sim_lib.dir/src/timing/timing_model.cpp.o
